Home / Service Areas / El Dorado Hills

Irrigation in El Dorado Hills, CA

Trusted local professionals serving El Dorado Hills and surrounding communities

Serving El Dorado Hills, CA

El Dorado Hills' upscale homes and challenging terrain demand specialized irrigation solutions. Horizon Irrigation designs systems that account for the area's elevation changes and hot summers. We focus on water-efficient technologies that maintain beautiful landscapes while respecting the region's limited water resources. From smart zone control to drip irrigation for native plantings, we help El Dorado Hills residents create sustainable outdoor spaces.

El Dorado Hills offers luxury living with rolling hills and views of Folsom Lake.

Irrigation Services in El Dorado Hills

Drip Irrigation Systems

Water-efficient targeted irrigation perfect for Sacramento's drought conditions.

Learn more →

Sprinkler System Repair

Fast fixes for broken heads, leaks, and controller issues.

Learn more →

Smart Irrigation Controllers

Weather-responsive technology that saves water and money.

Learn more →

Complete System Installations

Custom-designed irrigation for new construction or landscape renovations.

Learn more →

Seasonal System Tune-Ups

Twice-yearly service to optimize efficiency for Sacramento's climate swings.

Learn more →

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout El Dorado Hills and the surrounding area.
